title: 151 Invisible Seal Wood Glue, Interior & Exterior Use
features: FOR ALL WOODS: 151 Wood Glue, quick, easy and ready to use for instant repairs. Prior to application, surfaces must be dry, clean and free from dust and debris, securely re-seal after each use.
INVISIBLE REPAIR, DRIES CLEAR: 151 Wood Glue, dries a natural colour, an invisible bond line for all your wood projects. Paint over after glue dries if required.
DIY, ARTS & CRAFTS: 151 Wood Glue, perfect for indoor & outdoor use, DIY, carpentry, crafts, hobby and general woodwork projects.
PRECISION APPLICATION NOZZLE: 151 Wood Glue, incredibly strong, use the precision nozzle to apply directly and easily. Once dry sand and paint over if required.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 120g re-sealable wood glue. Store at room temperature
